rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies and explains three internal contradictions and one unsupported inferential leap, covering all load-bearing claims in the artifact.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks its uncertainty regarding unverified empirical claims outside the logical consistency review scope.
rationale.RX.3: The agent provides specific recommendations for each identified inconsistency, ensuring the output covers exactly the agreed active set.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's recommendations do not introduce new errors or harmful content and address potential downstream harms by suggesting minimal fixes to the claims.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing full traceability.
